title: Insiderbets Journal
content: When people upgrade from one version to another, it should be painfully clear when something will break. It should be possible to upgrade to a version that lists deprecations, remove what's deprecated, then upgrade to the version where the deprecations become removals.
author: Insiderbets

title: Know the Odds Before You Invest.
content: An AI-powered research tool that analyzes the likelihood a company can sustain revenue growth. Grounded in business model fundamentals and current market economics, it delivers a clear, unbiased signal on what the odds look like; both short and long term.
author: Insiderbets
